types.name: Config
docs: Stores global configuration for CHAR Coin.

fields.name: halted
docs: emergency state that indicates if the contract is halted.

types.name: ConfigAccount
docs: Account that holds the global configuration.

types.name: Treasury

Account structure for the DAO Treasury.

fields.name: owners
docs: List of multisig owner public keys.

fields.name: threshold
docs: Approval threshold required for executing a withdrawal.

fields.name: withdrawal_count
docs: Counter for executed withdrawals.

docs: Account structure for a withdrawal proposal.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount (in lamports) proposed for withdrawal.

fields.name: recipient
docs: Recipient account to which funds will be sent.

fields.name: approvals
docs: List of multisig approvals (owner public keys) collected.

fields.name: executed
docs: Whether this proposal has been executed.
